1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: get high risk quick-clay areas within Trondheim extent

5.description: find buildings intersecting high risk quick-clay areas

7.description: calculate distance from filtered buildings to centroid

8.description: ensure one row per building with min distance

9.description: sort by distance ascending and by building ID as tie-breaker
